title: habenaria lehmanniana
intro: Habenaria lehmanniana, commonly known as the Yellow Egerton's Pansy Orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including the treatment of skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, due to its antioxidant and antiseptic properties. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by boiling the leaves and roots, and it can be consumed as a tea or used topically as a poultice or ointment.
